title: Donnellsmithia juncea

The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its potential to lower cholesterol levels and exhibit antioxidant activity, contributing to overall cardiovascular health and anti-inflammatory effects. The bioactive constituents of Donnellsmithia juncea include sesquiterpenes, flavonoids, and coumarins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
